name: Premium 400 Aqua
comment:
380W Outdoor IP65 Movinghead Beam: Light Source
Lamp: Sirius Series 380W
Color Temperature: 7800K±200K
Source life expectancy: 3000 hours
Optics
Adjustable Beam Angle: 0°～ 2°
Focus: Motorized Focus
Color System
Colour wheel: 14 colour filters + White
Front Side Aura Ring Led: 40xRGB Leds
Body
Material: High temperature and anti-UV ABS
Body Color: Black
Transport: Two side handles
Device Locking PAN and TILT: Yes
Packing
Professional 90 Degree Clamp: Optional
Power Cable: Truecon with Cable
Signal: Seetronic Male / Female Cable ‘’5 Pin’’
Control
Protocols: RDM DMX512 ‘’Built-in Program, DMX, Master Slave’’
Short Mode: 19 Channels
Standard Mode: 19 Channels
Display: LCD Display
Dimmer / Strobe
Dimmer: 0-100% Electronic Dimmer
Strobe: Variable speeds (15 F.P.S at maximum)
Dynamic Effects
Fixed Gobo: 17 fixed gobos + open
Effect: High speed shake effect
Strobe Effect: Mechanical shutter and adjustable speed strobe effect
Frost: Motorized
Dimmer: Mechanical dimmer
Prism
Prism 1: 8-face prism
Prism 2: 16-face prism

Prism Effect 1: Double Prism
Light Output Beam Mode
7 mt.: 209,000 Lux (2º)
Physical
IP Rating: Waterproof Outdoor IP 65
Net Weight: 22kg
Dimension: 390mm x 300mm x 600mm
Cooling: Forced Air With Fan
Clamp: Omega Brackets 90 Degree Professional Clamp ‘’Optional’’
Connectors: PowerCon + Signal: 3 pin or 5 Pin
Electrical
Main Powersupply: 100V-240V 50/60Hz
Input Power: 450W@230V
Power Factor: PF > 0.90
